title: La Luna: Espejo Cósmico del Tiempo

segments.narrative: En la noche más oscura, un faro eterno nos observa desde arriba.
segments.visual_prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a majestic, super-bright full moon slowly rising over a jagged, dark silhouetted mountain range. Deep blue hour sky, subtle atmospheric haze, photorealistic, 8k, high contrast.

segments.narrative: Nuestra compañera más cercana, un mundo de secretos inexplorados y promesas futuras.
segments.visual_prompt: Ultra-slow, ethereal zoom-in on a highly detailed, photorealistic surface of the moon, showcasing distinct craters, maria, and subtle geological features, bathed in soft, silvery moonlight. Scientific documentary style, 4k.

segments.narrative: Nacida de una colisión cataclísmica entre la joven Tierra y un protoplaneta errante.
segments.visual_prompt: Dynamic, hyper-realistic CGI simulation of a massive protoplanet (Theia) violently impacting a molten early Earth, showering incandescent debris into space. Fiery orange, red, and yellow hues dominate, scientific animation style, high-energy.

segments.narrative: Hace 4.5 mil millones de años, de ese impacto, surgió nuestro satélite.
segments.visual_prompt: Swirling, glowing ring of incandescent debris and cosmic dust slowly coalescing and condensing into a nascent spherical body in the dark void of space, radiating faint light. Artistic scientific illustration, ethereal.

segments.narrative: Su inmensa gravedad esculpe los océanos de la Tierra, un pulso vital para el planeta.
segments.visual_prompt: Time-lapse effect of a massive ocean tide dramatically rising rapidly on a rugged, rocky coast, with powerful waves crashing against cliffs. A large, bright full moon is visible in the background, cinematic, epic scale.

segments.narrative: Las mareas lunares, un ritmo ancestral que rige la vida en nuestras costas.
segments.visual_prompt: Aerial view of a vast, deep blue ocean at twilight, with subtle, shimmering reflections of a crescent moon on its undulating surface. The scene conveys calm yet immense power, photorealistic, serene, soft light.

segments.narrative: Desde la antigüedad, la Luna ha sido musa, deidad y guía para la humanidad.
segments.visual_prompt: An ancient Greek philosopher, robed, gazing up intently at a prominent full moon from an outdoor observatory, surrounded by rudimentary astronomical instruments. Classical painting style, warm torchlight, contemplative mood.

segments.narrative: Inspirando mitos, leyendas y los sueños más imposibles de volar a sus cielos.
segments.visual_prompt: Seamlessly transitioning hand-drawn animated sequence showcasing diverse historical cultures (e.g., Egyptian, Mayan, Norse) depicting the moon in their distinct art forms, rituals, or constellations. Artistic, cultural collage.

segments.narrative: Hasta que el imposible se hizo realidad: la pisamos.
segments.visual_prompt: Iconic, sharply focused close-up shot of Neil Armstrong's pristine boot print on the fine lunar regolith, with the barren, desolate moonscape subtly blurred in the background. High contrast, documentary archival style.

segments.narrative: Un pequeño paso para un hombre, un salto gigantesco para nuestra especie.
segments.visual_prompt: Wide, low-angle shot of an astronaut, with the American flag proudly planted next to them, standing on the lunar surface. Earth is a vibrant blue marble in the dark background. Dramatic, stark sunlight, heroic perspective.

segments.narrative: Recogimos rocas, plantamos banderas y dejamos nuestra huella en otro mundo.
segments.visual_prompt: Overhead shot of a robust lunar rover traversing a rough, rocky, cratered landscape, kicking up fine dust. Stark sunlight creates sharp shadows. Highly detailed, photorealistic, scientific discovery context.

segments.narrative: Hoy, miramos más allá de la simple visita.
segments.visual_prompt: Stunning concept art of a futuristic modular lunar base under a transparent dome, bathed in an ethereal glow. Astronauts in advanced suits walk outside. A beautiful Earthrise graces the distant horizon. High-tech, aspirational.

segments.narrative: ¿Recursos vitales? ¿Un trampolín hacia las estrellas más lejanas?
segments.visual_prompt: Cinematic close-up of a high-tech drill bit extracting glowing, crystalline 'ice' (water ice) from the shadowed interior of a dark lunar crater. Emphasizes resource potential, blue and white light, scientific visualization.

segments.narrative: La Luna es el próximo capítulo de la odisea espacial humana.
segments.visual_prompt: A sleek, futuristic multi-stage spaceship smoothly launching from a massive lunar launchpad, ascending powerfully into the infinite blackness of space. Earth is a distant, shimmering sphere below. Dynamic, cinematic, wide shot.

segments.narrative: Cada noche, ese disco plateado nos recuerda nuestro lugar en el cosmos.
segments.visual_prompt: A solitary figure, silhouetted against a vast, star-studded night sky, looking up with awe and contemplation at a bright, clear full moon. Serene, high artistic quality, conveys wonder.

segments.narrative: Un faro en la oscuridad, un testigo silencioso de eones de existencia.
segments.visual_prompt: Ultra-slow, majestic zoom out from the full moon, showing it gradually becoming a smaller, prominent dot in the immense tapestry of space, surrounded by countless twinkling stars. Peaceful yet vast, astronomical perspective.

segments.narrative: La Luna: más que una roca, un sueño eterno que sigue encendiendo nuestra imaginación.
segments.visual_prompt: Majestic time-lapse sequence of the moon phases, from a sliver of crescent to a brilliant full moon and back, seamlessly transitioning against a dark, star-filled sky. Artistic and symbolic, celestial beauty.
